description_long: This is a large, industrial-style storage locker with four tall, rectangular compartments, each featuring a robust metal door. The doors are reinforced with metallic edging and have recessed pull handles, as well as visible latches for secure closure. The exterior is finished in a dark, slightly mottled texture, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for heavy-duty environments. The sides of the locker display geometric, panel-like detailing, adding to its industrial aesthetic. The interior of each compartment appears spacious, designed to accommodate bulky items or equipment. There are no visible ventilation patterns, and the overall construction suggests durability and security.
description: A large, industrial metal storage locker with four reinforced doors, recessed handles, and a rugged dark finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open doors, recessed handles, and spacious interior compartments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the geometric panel detailing and the depth of the locker.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid back panels with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing similar geometric detailing and the open depth of the compartments.
